# Description

AgeingError

- Software to estimate ageing error given double-reads of hard
  structures (e.g., otoliths)

# Instructions

The easiest installation method is to use a pre-compiled version on
R-universe via

``` r

install.packages("AgeingError", repos = c("https://noaa-fisheries-integrated-toolbox.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
```

You can also install from GitHub using the code below which will compile
the package locally (which takes longer and requires
[Rtools](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/) for Windows
users).

``` r

remotes::install_github("pfmc-assessments/AgeingError")
```

See [the
vignette](https://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/articles/getting_started.html)
for detailed description and example use.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`CreateData()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/CreateData.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Deprecated function renamed to load_data()
- [`CreateSpecs()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/CreateSpecs.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Deprecated function renamed to load_specs()
- [`DoApplyAgeError()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/DoApplyAgeError.md)
  : Run the ageing error optimization routine
- [`PlotOutputFn()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/PlotOutputFn.md)
  : Plot output
- [`ProcessResults()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/ProcessResults.md)
  : Process results of the ageing error estimation
- [`RunFn()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/RunFn.md)
  : Run ageing error model
- [`SimulatorFn()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/SimulatorFn.md)
  : Simulate double reading data
- [`StepwiseFn()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/StepwiseFn.md)
  : Step-wise model selection
- [`ageing_comparison()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/ageing_comparison.md)
  : Plot comparison of double age readings
- [`cMx()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/cMx.md)
  : Make a column matrix
- [`determine_n_sets()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/determine_n_sets.md)
  : Determine the number of data sets in a data file
- [`estgrowth.vb()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/estgrowth.vb.md)
  : Calculate von Bertanlaffy Growth Parameters from Lengths and Ages
- [`fit()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/fit.md)
  : Fit an ageing error model using TMB
- [`load_data()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/load_data.md)
  : Load the formatted ageing error data
- [`load_specs()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/load_specs.md)
  : Read the ageing error specifications
- [`minimizer()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/minimizer.md)
  : Minimize the negative log likelihood
- [`plot_output()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/plot_output.md)
  : Plot output
- [`rMx()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/rMx.md)
  : Make a row matrix
- [`run()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/run.md)
  : Run ageing error routine
- [`tally_repeats()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/tally_repeats.md)
  : Tally repeated age reading combinations in a new count column
- [`write_data_file()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/write_data_file.md)
  : Write a data file for the AgeingError package
- [`write_files()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/write_files.md)
  : Write the input files (data and specifications) for the AgeingError
  package
- [`write_specs_file()`](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/reference/write_specs_file.md)
  : Write a specifications file for the AgeingError package

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Estimating ageing error using the TMB model written by André
  Punt](http://pfmc-assessments.github.io/AgeingError/articles/getting_started.md):
